nasb.text: Otherwise, if I had dealt treacherously against his life (and there is nothing hidden from the king), then you yourself would have stood aloof.”

esv.text: On the other hand, if I had dealt treacherously against his life (and there is nothing hidden from the king), then you yourself would have stood aloof.”

cnv.text: 我若是膽大妄為傷害了他的性命，甚麼事情都瞞不過王的，那時你也不會維護我。”

ccb.text: 如果我胆敢杀死押沙龙，王迟早会查出真相，到时你就撒手不管了。”
